violations.text: Food debris was observed in the far end hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Proper use of a hand sink was discussed, and hand sink was cleared of debris at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Omelet Bites in the cold drawer unit below the sandwich prep station were observed at 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. The PIC elected to voluntarily dispose of the omelet bites upon observation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed in need of adjustment or repair: - The cold drawer unit below the sandwich prep area was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit (Unit observed flashing "P2"). (Food items were removed and unit taken out of service at time of inspection.) - The door to the Low Boy Cooler near the Drive-thru window was observed not shutting properly (internal drink organizer not allowing door to close.) Organizer unit to be adjusted to allow for the door to close properly. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Stirring spoon was observed in use with stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
